candidates.why: This is the only visible D&A-like row near the selected COGS bucket, but it appears as a component listed beneath the selected parent row 'Cost of product and service revenue', so it is already embedded in the chosen COGS total. It is also mixed with impairment, which should not be separately added.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added. The visible depreciation/amortization row sits as a sub-component of the selected COGS parent total and would double count if added separately.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization Expense in Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears directly beneath the selected parent row 'Research and development expenses', indicating it is a component already included in that selected total. Also, 'Research and development expenses' was already selected for both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD, so adding R&D D&A separately would be inappropriate under the R&D interaction rule.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation & Amortization in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: This row appears directly beneath the selected parent row 'General and administrative expenses', indicating it is a component already included in that selected total rather than a separate same-level expense to add later.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA D&A should be added. Both visible D&A rows are sub-components of already selected parent expense rows, and the R&D D&A row is additionally excluded because R&D is already explicitly selected in both XSGA_COMPONENTS and XRD.
